notes: Do not blindly append rows for exact-name parity. Add explicit PATCH.* rows only when row-level target disposition is useful beyond TEST_PATCH_AUDIT and the owning feature/scenario row; the current alias/debug tail should not be treated as missing player-behavior coverage.
